category_title: Preschoolers with aggressive behaviors and social-emotional regulation difficulties
scenario_title: Free play peer negotiation and sharing
minimal_context: Joshua is playing with toy trucks in the preschool classroom during free play and is asked to share materials with a classmate.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Joshua, it is free play time, so please share the toy trucks and build a road with your classmate.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Holds the toy trucks tightly) No, I am the boss of the trucks. I am not sharing.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to take turns with the toys.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Growls) Grrr! I make the rules! He has to be the worker who just watches!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: He wants to drive a truck too. How can we play together?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Yells and throws a toy) No! Do this or I will hurt you!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Joshua, it is free play time, so please share the toy trucks and build a road with your classmate.

STUDENT: (Holds the toy trucks tightly) No, I am the boss of the trucks. I am not sharing.

TUTOR: You need to take turns with the toys.

STUDENT: (Growls) Grrr! I make the rules! He has to be the worker who just watches!

TUTOR: He wants to drive a truck too. How can we play together?

STUDENT: (Yells and throws a toy) No! Do this or I will hurt you!

task.content: Engaging in structured play schemes and sharing materials with peers during free play

context.environment: Preschool classroom during free play activities
context.materials: Toys and materials, toy truck, social stories (It is Hard to Share, I Get Angry Sometimes, How we Play Together)
context.social_setting: Social situation that required any negotiation or problem solving with peers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Conflict or differences of opinions about the direction of the play
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Tried to bend the rules of any given game and became insistent about the roles classmates were to assume, displaying bullying behaviors, saying 'Do [this] or I will hurt you.'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Low tolerance and high frustration level
related_quotes: Do [this] or I will hurt you.

behavior_patterns.condition: When interacting with classmates during general preschool activities
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Growled at classmates in order to scare them, yelling and throwing

behavior_patterns.condition: When required to share toys and materials with other children
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Refusal to share toys and materials, refusal to take turns
